config.sqlTemplate: SELECT count() AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanName = 'claude_code.llm_request' AND ServiceName = 'claude-code' AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64}) AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
config.name: Total LLM requests

config.sqlTemplate: SELECT round(countIf(toUInt8OrZero(SpanAttributes['attempt']) > 1) * 100.0 / count(), 1) AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanName = 'claude_code.llm_request' AND ServiceName = 'claude-code' AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64}) AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
config.name: Retry rate %

config.sqlTemplate: SELECT round(quantile(0.95)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['ttft_ms'])), 0) AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanName = 'claude_code.llm_request' AND ServiceName = 'claude-code' AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64}) AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
config.name: TTFT p95 (ms)

config.sqlTemplate: SELECT round(quantile(0.95)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['duration_ms'])), 0) AS value FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanName = 'claude_code.llm_request' AND ServiceName = 'claude-code' AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64}) AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64})
config.name: Latency p95 (ms)

config.sqlTemplate: SELECT SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] AS model, count() AS requests, round(countIf(SpanAttributes['success'] != 'true') * 100.0 / count(), 2) AS err_pct, round(countIf(toUInt8OrZero(SpanAttributes['attempt']) > 1) * 100.0 / count(), 1) AS retry_pct, round(quantile(0.5)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['ttft_ms'])), 0) AS ttft_p50_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['ttft_ms'])), 0) AS ttft_p95_ms, round(quantile(0.5)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['duration_ms'])), 0) AS lat_p50_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['duration_ms'])), 0) AS lat_p95_ms, round(quantile(0.99)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['duration_ms'])), 0) AS lat_p99_ms, round(sum(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['output_tokens'])) / greatest(sum(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['duration_ms'])) - sum(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['ttft_ms'])), 1) * 1000, 1) AS gen_toks, round(sum(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['input_tokens'])), 0) AS tok_in, round(sum(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['cache_read_tokens'])), 0) AS tok_cache, round(sum(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['output_tokens'])), 0) AS tok_out FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanName = 'claude_code.llm_request' AND ServiceName = 'claude-code' AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64}) AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64}) GROUP BY model ORDER BY requests DESC
config.name: Per-model metrics

config.sqlTemplate: SELECT toDate(Timestamp) AS day, count() AS requests, round(countIf(SpanAttributes['success'] != 'true') * 100.0 / count(), 2) AS err_pct, round(countIf(toUInt8OrZero(SpanAttributes['attempt']) > 1) * 100.0 / count(), 1) AS retry_pct, round(quantile(0.95)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['ttft_ms'])), 0) AS ttft_p95_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['duration_ms'])), 0) AS lat_p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanName = 'claude_code.llm_request' AND ServiceName = 'claude-code' AND Timestamp >= fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({startDateMilliseconds:Int64}) AND Timestamp < fromUnixTimestamp64Milli({endDateMilliseconds:Int64}) GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
config.name: Daily trend
